title: Calling on elected officials and civil society leaders to counter antisemitism and educate the public on the contributions of the Jewish American community.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
policy_area: Civil Rights and Liberties, Minority Issues
crs_summary: This resolution calls on elected officials, faith leaders, and civil society leaders to condemn and counter acts of anti-Semitism.
last_action_text: Motion to reconsider laid on the table Agreed to without objection.
